coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 10:55 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 10:55 at 65%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 100% for 22:37. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 100% for 22:37. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/3. 10:55 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/3. 55-55% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/3. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/3. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 2/3. 55% FTP × 10:55. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 22:37 at 100%. Then 10min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 100-100% FTP, 85-100 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 22:37 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 22:37. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 67 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 56min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 86% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 67 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
